chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-5543 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1) For hearing of CMA No. 23114/2025. 2) For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. M/s. Amjad Ali Khan Ruk & Abid Hussain, Advocate for Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Saifullah DC Customs (Appraisement-West). ___________________ Mr. Saifullah DC Customs (Appraisement-West) states that the I.O of the FIRs has not seized the subject goods. That being so, there is no impediment in re-examination of the goods ordered by the Collector of Customs (Adjudication). The respondents No. 2 & 3 shall ensure compliance of the order dated 24.10.2025 passed by the Collector of Customs (Adjudication) be made within three days in accordance with Rules. Petition disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
